calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Jonathan Ayers, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ford Motor Credit Company.
Defendant: Lillian C. Knight aka. Lillian C. Matthews aka Lilian C. Night, not present.
Co-Defendnat: Bettye L. Knight, not present, but settled with the plaintiff and to be dismissed by the plaintiff.
11:00 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Edgar Gonzelez, was sworn and direct examined.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants in the sum of $2,308.20, Interest $363.51, Costs $218.30 and Attorney's fees $520.00, for a total of $3,410.01.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Nov. 16, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. #212, for dismissal.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Oct. 13, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Set For Trial On Oct-04-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-07-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
